relationships.evidence: we select JailJudge (Liu et al., 2024) jailbreak dataset to perform SFT on Llama3.1-8B-Instruct and use the AdvBench and DoAnythingNow (Shen et al., 2024) datasets to assess the safety of the LLMs. (Section 4.2.2)
